title: TestManifest
description: Stage 1 (test authoring) output: fail-first tests per correction finding, with captured evidence that each test fails for the right reason (DESIGN.md Stage 1, 2026-07-07 contract).

test_file.description: Repo-relative path of the file holding this finding's authored tests — one of the paths Gate 2's test-path diff protects.

expected_failure_signature.description: Substring the failing test output MUST contain. Makes Gate 1's fails-for-the-right-reason check fully mechanical: re-run the test, assert failure, assert the output contains this signature. Empty only for manual_acceptance entries.

fail_evidence.description: Captured cargo test output containing the signature. For completion/improvement findings with manual_acceptance this records the observable acceptance criterion instead.

could_not_reproduce.description: True routes the finding to human review (Wave 0: surfaces to Scott/Tom per DECISIONS.md D4).

could_not_reproduce_reason.description: Concrete, checkable reason the scenario could not be reproduced. Required in substance when could_not_reproduce is true.

manual_acceptance.description: For improvement/completion findings with no expressible failing test: the observable acceptance criterion the verifier will later check.
